div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: 🟩 Claude Agent SDK — used for BUILDING

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 55) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Strong fit when:
• Real filesystem + shell work
• Loopy tactical execution until a token
• Rich tool catalog (Read/Write/Edit/Bash/Glob/Grep)
• You want Claude Code's system prompt for free

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 55) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Primitives we use:
• ClaudeSDKClient + ClaudeAgentOptions
• AgentDefinition dict (subagents)
• plugins=[{type: 'local', path}]
• hooks=QUALITY_HOOKS (PreToolUse/PostToolUse)
• setting_sources=[] for session isolation
• system_prompt preset=claude_code + append

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 55) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Role in this repo:
Factory — supervisor + 5 subagents
ship a live Next.js app to Vercel

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 55) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Strong fit when:
• High-level reasoning + typed artifacts
• Multiple specialists reporting to one leader
• Structured outputs via Pydantic / output_schema
• Provider-flexible (Gemini first, LiteLLM for rest)

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 55) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Primitives we use:
• LlmAgent + instruction
• AgentTool(child_agent) · the delegator pattern
• FunctionTool (plain Python)
• session.state + output_key
• ag-ui-adk · add_adk_fastapi_endpoint

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 55) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Role in this repo:
Boardroom — Theo (CEO) + 6 specialists
produce the Lean Canvas + BuildPlan

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 55) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
🤝 Handoff
start_factory FunctionTool
POST /factory
{ build_plan, lean_canvas, brand }
then consumes RUN_FINISHED
